title: geofencing — retention windows
description: GeofenceCheck is an immutable audit log. Retention drives soft-delete after 7 years (default) + hard-delete after 10 years with anonymisation. Longer retention on override rows because they carry disputed-clock-in evidence.
compliance_regimes_referenced: employment law (varies by jurisdiction — US FLSA 3y for wage/hour records)
sox 404 (financial controls — relevant if attendance data drives payroll)

cold.description: Soft-deleted + anonymised (subject_id nullified). Preserves aggregate stats.

hot.description: Longer retention because these carry disputed-clock-in evidence. Non-configurable floor.
